title: Search content within documents
excerpt: I am planning on having a series of procedures within a Workspace, and while you can search for the title of a document, if you are trying to look something up, but can only remember a keyword, you currently can not sear…

posts.author: jasonadams (Jason Adams)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am planning on having a series of procedures within a Workspace, and while you can search for the title of a document, if you are trying to look something up, but can only remember a keyword, you currently can not search for it. For example, within a document called ‘Chocolate Chip Cookie Recipe’, I want to be able to search for ‘Nutmeg’ and see all the documents that ‘Nutmeg’ appear in.

Please upvote to allow native content searching within Monday instead of using 3rd party developers that require access to your data.

Hello,

It sounds like you’re looking for a more robust content search feature within Monday.comto improve your workflow efficiency. Being able to search for keywords within documents would definitely be a game-changer, especially for those detailed procedures and recipes! This feature could save time and make information retrieval much more intuitive.

I suggest reaching out to Mondaycom’s support or community forums with this request. They might already be working on it, or your suggestion could be the nudge they need to prioritize this feature.

In the meantime, have you tried using any search tools or integrations that Mondaycomcurrently supports to see if they can meet your needs? Sometimes there might be a third-party solution that aligns well with your requirements without compromising data security.

Best Regards

For example, within a document called ‘Chocolate Chip Cookie Recipe’, I want to be able to search for ‘Nutmeg’ and see all the documents that ‘Nutmeg’ appear in. ReadWorks com

Please upvote to allow native content searching within Monday instead of using 3rd party developers that require access to your data.

Hello,
Feature Request: Native Content Searching in Workspaces
Currently, while allows users to search for document titles, there’s no native functionality to search for specific keywords within document content. This limitation can hinder productivity, especially when trying to locate information tied to a specific term you may not recall the exact document title for.

Example Use Case:
Imagine a Workspace containing a document titled Chocolate Chip Cookie Recipe. If I need to locate this document but only remember the keyword Nutmeg, the current search functionality won’t help me find it.

Proposed Solution:
Introduce native content searching capabilities within Workspaces. This feature would enable users to search for keywords across all documents, making data retrieval faster and more efficient.

Why This Matters:

Enhances productivity and accessibility.
Reduces reliance on third-party developers who require access to sensitive data.
Keeps workflows centralized within ’s ecosystem.
Call to Action:
If you agree, please upvote and share your thoughts to make this feature a priority!
